title: Magnificently Crunchy Peruvian Rice Paper Spring Rolls
description: A sour, crunchy, and indulgent Peruvian dish featuring rice paper sheets, made vegan-friendly with plant-based ingredients, and cooked to perfection in a bain-marie
instructions: Fill a large bowl with warm water to soak the rice paper sheets
In a separate bowl, mix together the tofu, pickled ginger, red onion, aji amarillo peppers, and cilantro
Add the lime juice and olive oil to the bowl and stir to combine
Soak a rice paper sheet in the warm water for about 10 seconds, then place on a clean surface
Place about 1 tablespoon of the tofu mixture in the center of the rice paper sheet
Fold the bottom half of the rice paper sheet over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the sheet to form a tight cylinder
Place the spring rolls in a bain-marie and cook for 5 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown
Serve the spring rolls hot with your favorite dipping sauce
